title: 1031 Exchange
definition: Tax strategy deferring capital gains by reinvesting property sale proceeds into like-kind property.

title: Accredited Investor
definition: SEC: $200K+ income or $1M+ net worth excl. home. Required for most private deals.

title: AD (Authorized Dealer)
definition: Official retail channel for luxury watches. "The call" from your AD = your waitlisted watch arrived.

title: Adaptogens
definition: Natural substances (ashwagandha, reishi, lion's mane) claimed to help the body adapt to stress.

title: Bespoke
definition: Custom-made from scratch. In tailoring: pattern-cut to your body with multiple fittings. Highest tier.

title: Biohacking
definition: Using science/tech/self-experimentation to optimize biology. From cold exposure to peptide injections.

title: Body (wine)
definition: Weight of wine in your mouth. Light (skim milk) to full (whole milk).

title: Bourbon
definition: American whiskey: 51%+ corn, aged in new charred oak. Cultural renaissance happening now.

title: Cap Rate
definition: Net operating income ÷ purchase price. 5% cap = 5% annual return on investment property.

title: CBT
definition: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy. Evidence-based: change thought patterns to change behaviors and emotions.

title: CGM
definition: Continuous Glucose Monitor. Real-time blood sugar tracking. Now used by wellness enthusiasts.

title: Charter
definition: Renting a yacht by the week with captain/crew. Med charters: $15K–$200K+/week.

title: Complication
definition: Any watch function beyond hours/minutes/seconds. Chronograph, perpetual calendar, tourbillon.

title: Concierge Medicine
definition: Membership healthcare ($2–25K/year): same-day appointments, longer visits, direct phone access.

title: DAF
definition: Donor-Advised Fund. Contribute, get tax deduction, distribute grants at your pace. Simplest giving vehicle.

title: Dry (wine)
definition: Not sweet. Most wines in professional settings are dry.

title: FBO
definition: Fixed-Base Operator. Private terminal for private jets. No TSA, no crowds.

title: Give or Get
definition: "Give" = donate personally. "Get" = raise from your network. Board fundraising minimum.

title: Gut Microbiome
definition: Trillions of bacteria in digestive system influencing immunity to mood. Foundation of functional medicine.

title: Handicap
definition: Golf skill number. Lower = better. Scratch (0) = par. 20 = casual recreational.

title: Holy Trinity
definition: Three most prestigious watchmakers: Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Vacheron Constantin.

title: HRV
definition: Heart Rate Variability. Time variation between heartbeats. Higher = better fitness/recovery.

title: ICF
definition: International Coaching Federation. Gold standard certification for executive coaches.

title: Lot
definition: Single auction item. Has estimate (predicted range) and reserve (minimum seller accepts).

title: Manufacture
definition: Watchmaker producing movements in-house. A mark of true horological craftsmanship.

title: Marque
definition: Brand/make of a car for prestigious manufacturers. "What marque?" = sophisticated way to ask.

title: MTM
definition: Made-to-Measure. Garment adjusted from existing pattern. Better than off-rack, less than bespoke.

title: NAD+
definition: Cellular energy coenzyme. IV infusions ($250–750) claimed to slow aging. Popular in longevity circles.

title: NetJets
definition: World's largest fractional jet company (Berkshire Hathaway). Default private aviation reference.

title: Omakase
definition: "I'll leave it to you." High-end sushi where the chef selects each piece. Eat immediately.

title: Par
definition: Expected strokes per hole. Par 3 (short), par 4 (medium), par 5 (long). Course: par 70–72.

title: PE (Private Equity)
definition: Funds buying/restructuring/selling companies. Minimums $250K–$1M+. Lock-up 7–10 years.

title: Quiet Luxury
definition: Wealth via quality/fabric/fit, not logos. "Stealth wealth." The Row, Loro Piana, Brunello Cucinelli.

title: Ring Gauge
definition: Cigar diameter in 64ths of an inch. Thicker = cooler burn, more complex flavor.

title: Scratch Golfer
definition: 0 handicap, shoots even par. Top 1–2% of golfers worldwide.

title: Single Malt
definition: Scotch from one distillery, 100% malted barley. Generally more prestigious than blended.

title: SPV
definition: Special Purpose Vehicle. Legal entity for a single investment. Mechanism for angel syndicates.

title: Tannins
definition: Grape skin/seed/oak compounds creating a drying, gripping sensation — like oversteeped tea.

title: Terroir
definition: French: wine's character from place — soil, climate, altitude, exposure.

title: TM
definition: Transcendental Meditation. Mantra-based, ~$1K course. Ray Dalio, Seinfeld, many in finance.

title: VO2 Max
definition: Maximum oxygen use rate during exercise. Gold standard cardiovascular fitness metric.

title: WHOOP
definition: Wrist strap tracking strain/recovery/sleep. Popular with competitive athletes and Type-A executives.
